reasoning: Content A includes a source (beaconbio.org) explicitly covering German HPAI H5 cases by federal state between September 1 and October 20, 2025, directly relevant to the query's timeframe and geographic scope, plus EFSA/ECDC data confirming detections starting September 6, 2025 in Europe including Germany.
